name: Dream Jello Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Raspberry Jello, OR Cherry Jello
1 can Strawberry Pie Filling (or your choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello in hot water.
2. Mix together all ingredients; pour into a 9x13-inch dish.
3. Chill until firm.
4. Blend well and spread on top of the jello mixture.
